'''2-124''' was an [[Uulshos justice droid]] programmed as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]].

==Biography==
Captured in a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operation, 2-124 was probed to locate any useful intelligence he might contain. Before deep analysis of his memory banks could begin, the droid [[Death|killed]] dozens of Alliance soldiers and escaped.

2-124 vanished from [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence's]] view, only surfacing on a few occasions to kill select Alliance leaders. As the Alliance transitioned into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] included 2-124 in his confidential [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] brief that listed top fifty most dangerous beings to the New Republic, assuming that the droid's programming was sophisticated enough for it to understand the governmental shift.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]
